---
name: Field test report (telemetry-free)
about: Share a structured outcome without identifiers
title: "[Field Test] "
labels: needs testing
---

## Scenario

- Stage: 1 / 2 / 3
- Network condition: normal / heavy DPI / protocol block / intermittent / blackout / device constraints
- Network type: Wi-Fi / mobile / other
- Battery saver: on / off

## Outcome

- Connect result: success / failure / partial
- Time to connect: <10s / <30s / >30s
- Stability (approx): drops per 30 min
- Switching behavior: none / occasional / excessive

## Bundle

- Import result: success / failure
- Failure category (if any): invalid bundle / verification / decrypt / no profiles / other

## Attachments (optional)

- `report.json`

## Notes

Any extra context you can share safely.
